name: Manufacturer Atlas Navigation Surface
description: Route and view contract for the first Manufacturer Atlas operator surface. Defines the navigation endpoints, available views, and data sources.

routes.description: Interactive atlas explorer with lens-based graph navigation
Assembly constraint set viewer (deferred to future surface iteration)

construction_atlas_omni_view.description: Manufacturer Atlas graph data will feed Construction Atlas OMNI View for visual detail resolution in a future wave.

construction_application_os.description: Full UI rendering will be handled by Construction_Application_OS. This surface is a foundation-level inspector.
